title: grammica coryli
intro: Grammica coryli, also known as Bugleweed or Lycopus, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as an antispasmodic, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Grammica coryli include reducing anxiety and stress, lowering blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of hyperthyroidism. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
